IREC 2026 PR2 V1.0.ork.notes: Barrowman Cf=0.005 overestimates skin friction for this extreme-fineness rocket (fr=19.17, L=117.5in, D=6.13in). At burnout (alt=1766m, v=689m/s) Re~1.1e8 gives actual Cf~0.002, not 0.005. OR databranch confirms CD=0.276 at Mach 2.131. Numerical sweep (session 10): cdSub=0.30 reproduces OR apogee 32334ft to within 0.9%. Motor O5500X-PS, mass 29.891kg, geometry all confirmed correct â€” CD is sole source of -23.1% error.
